title: Top 5 Finance Stories Today

slides.headline: Buffett cuts ties with Gates Foundation
slides.explanation: Warren Buffett confirmed his firm has stopped donating to the Gates Foundation. He described the Microsoft founder's past association with Jeffrey Epstein as distasteful.

slides.headline: Fed leader speaks on the economy
slides.explanation: Fed Chair Kevin Warsh testified before the Senate banking committee this week. He discussed the current state of the economy and the future of interest rates.

slides.headline: China economic growth slows down
slides.explanation: China missed its growth targets as local demand weakened. Higher oil prices linked to the conflict in Iran also put a strain on the country's economy.

slides.headline: Anthropic eyes a stock market launch
slides.explanation: The AI startup is setting up meetings with investors to prepare for a potential public offering. They are aiming to go public as early as October.

slides.headline: Buffett backs Warsh for Fed role
slides.explanation: Warren Buffett shared his support for the decision to pick Kevin Warsh as Fed Chair. He believes Warsh is a good choice who will do his best in the role.

caption: From major shifts in philanthropy to big moves in the AI world, here is what you need to know about today's finance news. We are breaking down the latest updates on the economy, global markets, and leadership changes. Swipe through for the highlights. Read more on HEADLINNE.com.

title: Top 5 Geopolitics Headlines

slides.headline: Venezuela Begins Talks With Opposition
slides.explanation: The Venezuelan government is starting formal discussions with opposition leaders. They aim to work on strengthening the country's democratic institutions and electoral processes.

slides.headline: Australia's AI Plans Face Big Hurdles
slides.explanation: Anthony Albanese has unveiled a new plan for artificial intelligence in Australia. However, experts warn it will be difficult to regulate tech giants like Microsoft and Google that often hold more power than governments.

slides.headline: Germany Warns US Over Election Funding
slides.explanation: Germany is pushing back against a new US State Department plan to fund groups in Europe. German officials worry this could lead to interference in their upcoming elections.

slides.headline: Changes Coming to Australia's NDIS
slides.explanation: Internal documents show that nearly 145,000 Australians could lose support for autism under new NDIS reforms by 2030. Many of those affected are under the age of 18.

slides.headline: Ukraine Politics Shift Amid Ongoing War
slides.explanation: As the conflict in Ukraine continues, internal political tensions are rising. These shifts are creating new challenges for the country as it looks for a path to end the fighting.

caption: From rising political tensions in Ukraine to new concerns about AI regulation in Australia, here are the top five geopolitical stories you need to know today. Stay informed with Headlinne. Get the full details on our app. Read more on HEADLINNE.com.
